title: ChunkLoaders
body:
# ChunkLoaders
A simple datapack that creates a **chunk loader** when an **Ender Eye** is dropped onto a **Waxed Oxidized Copper Bulb**.

![Chunk Loader](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7490e527ca8341fd2c3c138e311a2a9a764d6673_0.webp)

## Features
* Drop an **Ender Eye** onto a **Waxed Oxidized Copper Bulb** to create a chunk loader.
* Toggle the chunk loader **on/off** by toggeling the copper bulb.

## How It Works
* Internally uses the `/forceload` command to keep chunks loaded.
* Check loaded chunks with `/forceload query`


## Credits
* Based on the original **Chunk Loaders** from **Vanilla Tweaks**.
* Vanilla Tweaks website: [https://vanillatweaks.net](https://vanillatweaks.net/)
